name: Shanghai Beite Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Beite Technology Co., Ltd. provides metal products for steering and shock absorber piston rod customers primarily in China. Its products include rack blanks, semi-finished racks, finished racks, finished valve sleeves, semi-finished input shafts, semi-finished worm shafts, pinion blanks, semi-finished pinions, piston rod blanks, semi-finished piston rods, and finished piston rods. The company is based in Shanghai, China.
